questions.q: Who plays Jay Pritchett, the family patriarch?

source.notes: Previously famous as Al Bundy in 'Married... with Children.'

questions.q: Which Colombian-born actress plays Gloria, Jay's much-younger second wife?

source.notes: From Barranquilla, Colombia. Became the highest-paid TV actress during the show's run.

questions.q: What is the name of Gloria's son from her previous marriage?

source.notes: Full name Manolo 'Manny' Delgado. Played by Rico Rodriguez.

questions.q: Who plays the goofy dad Phil Dunphy, known for his 'peerenting' style?

source.notes: Won two Emmy Awards for Outstanding Supporting Actor in a Comedy Series.

questions.q: What is Phil Dunphy's occupation?

source.notes: Works at the fictional Gil Thorpe Real Estate. 'Likes to think of himself as the Cool Dad.'

questions.q: Who are the show's same-sex couple who adopt a daughter in the pilot?

source.notes: Played by Jesse Tyler Ferguson and Eric Stonestreet. Stonestreet, who plays the flamboyant Cam, is actually straight.

questions.q: What is the name of Mitchell and Cameron's adopted daughter?

source.notes: Lily Tucker-Pritchett. Adopted from Vietnam. Played by Aubrey Anderson-Emmons from season 3.

questions.q: In what U.S. state is 'Modern Family' set?

source.notes: Set in a Los Angeles suburb. The Pritchetts live in a (fictional) neighborhood in L.A. County.

questions.q: On which US television network did 'Modern Family' air?

source.notes: Aired 2009-2020. 250 episodes. Won the Emmy for Outstanding Comedy Series 5 years in a row.

questions.q: Which high-achieving Dunphy sibling gets accepted to Caltech?

source.notes: Alex Dunphy, played by Ariel Winter. The family genius.

questions.q: Who plays the bubbly eldest Dunphy daughter, Haley?

source.notes: Hyland was 18 when the show premiered in 2009. Previously in 'Lipstick Jungle.'

questions.q: What is the name of Haley's long-term on-again/off-again boyfriend, known for his long hair?

source.notes: Dylan Marshall, played by Reid Ewing. Nicknamed 'Luke's future.'

questions.q: Whom does Julie Bowen play?

source.notes: Bowen won two Emmy Awards. Daughter of Jay Pritchett, wife of Phil.

questions.q: Who plays Cameron Tucker, Mitchell's flamboyant husband?

source.notes: Stonestreet won two Emmy Awards. Based his character partly on his Kansas farm upbringing.

questions.q: Which state did Cameron grow up in?

source.notes: Missouri farm boy. His parents' names are Merle and Barb Tucker.

questions.q: What is the name of Cameron's clown alter ego?

source.notes: Recurring character. Cam believes clowning is a noble art form.

questions.q: Who is Luke Dunphy's actor?

source.notes: Gould was revealed to be in Mensa (IQ 150+) despite playing the clueless Luke.

questions.q: What format does the show use to tell its stories?

source.notes: Like 'The Office' and 'Parks and Recreation.' Characters address an unseen documentary crew.

questions.q: Shelley Long guest-stars as which character — Jay's ex-wife and Claire and Mitchell's mother?

source.notes: Long is known for playing Diane Chambers on 'Cheers.'

questions.q: For how many seasons did 'Modern Family' run?

source.notes: Aired 2009-2020. 11 seasons. Won 22 Emmys including 5 Outstanding Comedy Series awards.
